name: star-citizen-interactive-map-starter
description: Themed Star Citizen route planner with 3D body textures, ranked personal trade runs, and shared community examples

scripts.test: node tests/router.test.mjs && node tests/trade-calculator.test.mjs && node tests/community-trade-runs.test.mjs
scripts.validate: node --check src/app.js && node --check src/router.js && node --check src/map-hierarchy.js && node --check src/map-2d.js && node --check src/map-3d.js && node --check src/body-textures.js && node --check src/trade-calculator.js && node --check src/storage.js && node --check scripts/update-universe-data.mjs && node --check scripts/update-trade-data.mjs
